title: Philips India Healthcare Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Philips India Healthcare Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare Capital India in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare Capital India:
Philips India Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare Capital India!
